title: Project Overview
document: Praangan Elitus is an ultra-luxury residential project located in Naroda Ahmedabad offering premium lifestyle residences with world-class amenities.

title: Developer
document: Praangan Elitus is developed by Praangan Infrastructure.

title: Luxury Positioning
document: The project is designed for luxury living with premium planning and elite amenities.

title: Architecture
document: Praangan Elitus features modern architecture inspired by global luxury standards.

title: Podium Concept
document: A full podium floor is dedicated to amenities and recreation.

title: Low Density
document: The project follows low-density planning for improved privacy and openness.

title: Address
document: Praangan Elitus is located near Dehgam Circle opposite Bilasiya Bus Stop Naroda Ahmedabad.

title: Airport Road
document: The project has easy connectivity to Airport Road.

title: SP Ring Road
document: Praangan Elitus is well connected to SP Ring Road.

document: The project is close to Naroda Dehgam Road.
